TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Luan_Qerimi, title = Luan_Qerimi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Luan_Qerimi} }

S.FORM: Luan Qerimi htuw squw 1929 neng 10 gat 15 nici', ruw 87 kawas qnxan niya'. hiya' qaniy ga sinmung baq balay pgeki' na squliq. yaquw squliq qsahuy geki' na Hamlet binrwan niy Shakespeare quw spgeki' niya', ruw kya cikay geki' na Arpaniya' uziy quw wal niya' skhopa' lalu' uziy. ruw pira' uziy pin'ega' uziy, mingluw kalay pcbaq sa p'ega' uziy. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors

Luan Qerimi htuw squw 1929 neng 10 gat 15 nici', ruw 87 kawas qnxan niya'. hiya' qaniy ga sinmung baq balay pgeki' na squliq. yaquw squliq qsahuy geki' na Hamlet binrwan niy Shakespeare quw spgeki' niya', ruw kya cikay geki' na Arpaniya' uziy quw wal niya' skhopa' lalu' uziy. ruw pira' uziy pin'ega' uziy, mingluw kalay pcbaq sa p'ega' uziy. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: luan qerimi ħtuw s~ɕquw **** neŋ ** ɣat ** niʦ~ʨiʔ, ruw ** kawas~ɕ qnxan nijaʔ. ħijaʔ qanij ɣa s~ɕinmuŋ βaq βalaj pɣekiʔ na s~ɕquliq. jaquw s~ɕquliq qs~ɕaħuj ɣekiʔ na ħamlet βinrwan nij s~ɕħakes~ɕpeare quw s~ɕpɣekiʔ nijaʔ, ruw kja ʦ~ʨikaj ɣekiʔ na arpanijaʔ uzij quw wal nijaʔ s~ɕkħopaʔ laluʔ uzij. ruw piraʔ uzij pinʔeɣaʔ uzij, miŋluw kalaj pʦ~ʨβaq s~ɕa pʔeɣaʔ uzij. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
